ghost_power_summary: Despite 0% reported utilization throughout cooldown, power remained elevated (77-78W) for the first minute, then slowly declined to ~66W after 5 minutes. This indicates the GPU never entered a low-power state (P8/P12) and continued to draw near‑active power due to P0 state and max memory clock retention.
supporting_prior_evidence: Previous tests (A100 idle 600s, memory clock logs) confirm that the A100 stays in P0 with memory clock at 1593 MHz even when fully idle, causing a baseline idle power of 58-78W depending on variant.
